lb-b5ig.title: Structured JSONL logging with live stream formatter
lb-b5ig.description: Port physarum's stream-json + formatter pattern to ralph_harness. Switch from plain --verbose text to --output-format stream-json (JSONL), pipe through tee (durable storage) then TypeScript formatter (live colored terminal output). Test in ralph-test-13 before lifting to harness.

lb-j4ge.title: Create ralph-test-13 test bed
lb-j4ge.description: Initialize a new repo at /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/ralph-test-13. Copy structure from ralph-test-12 (scripts/, CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, .env.example, .gitignore, Cargo.toml, src/, etc). This is our sandbox for testing logging changes without affecting the harness. Push to GitHub as coobeeyon/ralph-test-13.

lb-pz2p.title: Create scripts/stream-fmt.ts formatter
lb-pz2p.description: Port physarum's scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts to scripts/stream-fmt.ts. Nearly verbatim copy — it's already generic. Handles: system/init, assistant (tool_use for Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Agent, thinking, text), user (tool_result with code block collapsing), result (done summary with cost/turns). TTY-aware colors. Suppresses noisy tools (TodoRead/Write, TaskCreate/Get/Update/List, Read). Source: /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/physarum/scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts
